sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُمُّ تُعَلِّمُ بِنْتَهَا كَيْفَ تَنْسِجُ الصُّوفَ.
sentences.translation: Majka je učila svoju kćerku kako da tka vunu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother used to teach her daughter how to weave wool.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتَا تَجْلِسَانِ أَمَامَ الْبَيْتِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translationEn: They would sit in front of the house in the morning.

sentences.arabic: صَنَعَتَا سِجَّادَةً جَمِيلَةً مِنَ الصُّوفِ الْمُلَوَّنِ.
sentences.translation: Napravile su lijepi tepih od šarene vune.
sentences.translationEn: They made a beautiful carpet from coloured wool.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الصِّنَاعَةُ الْيَدَوِيَّةُ مَصْدَرَ رِزْقٍ لِكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الأُسَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ručni rad bio je izvor prihoda za mnoge porodice.
sentences.translationEn: Handicraft was a source of income for many families.
